_comment: GA (2026) Realtime session.update payload. Note the NESTED audio.input/output shape and output_modalities (these replaced the flat beta fields modalities/voice/input_audio_format/turn_detection/input_audio_transcription). Send over the WebRTC data channel `oai-events` or the WebSocket. Docs: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/realtime-conversations + https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/realtime-vad

session.instructions: You are a calm, concise voice companion. Confirm understanding before taking actions. Keep replies short.

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get the current weather for a city.

_alternatives.push_to_talk: set audio.input.turn_detection to null, then drive input_audio_buffer.commit + response.create yourself
_alternatives.own_the_response_create: set turn_detection.create_response=false to enforce exactly ONE response.create per turn
